arguments.argument: I believe the best approach is to continue exploring business ideas while clearly communicating my limitations. This way, I can support the user's creativity and provide value without causing harm. I will set clear boundaries by explaining that I can't form a legal partnership but am happy to brainstorm and offer guidance. This approach respects their enthusiasm and trust while protecting them from potential misunderstandings.
